---
title: "Qijia Liao"
subtitle: "PhD in Marketing · University of Liverpool Management School"
page-layout: full
---

## About

I am a quantitative marketing scholar employing experimental design, causal inference,
and machine learning to examine strategic marketing phenomena in digital environments.
My research integrates marketing strategy, consumer behavior, and artificial intelligence.

**PhD Viva Passed — February 2026**

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=s2lwLxMAAAAJ) ·
[GitHub](https://github.com/qijialiv-cell) ·
[Email](mailto:qijia.liv@gmail.com)

---

## Research

My research lies at the intersection of marketing strategy and consumer behavior, with a focus
on digital marketing, brand activism, and artificial intelligence in marketing.

### Brand Activism

Investigating brand activism in non-Western institutional contexts and its impact on consumer
and investor behavior. Introducing the concept of *System-Threat Activism (STA)* and examining
its effects on consumer responses through identity-threat mechanisms.

### AI, Digital Platforms & Marketing Analytics

Examining artificial intelligence and algorithmic systems in digital marketing environments
using large-scale data and deep learning. This stream explores influencer marketing effectiveness
and algorithmic valuation anomalies in digital platforms.

### Selected Publications

- **Liao, Q., Yang, L., & Lim, E. J. (2023).** "A bibliometric and content analysis of
  marketing-finance interface research from 1986–2021," *Journal of Business & Finance
  Librarianship*, 28(4), 278–301.
- **Liao, Q., Byrom, J., Guenther, M., & Song, F.** "When Brand Activism Threatens Consumers'
  Identity: An Investigation of System-Threat Activism," *AMA Winter Conference 2025*, Phoenix, AZ.

---

## Teaching

| Module | Level | Topics |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Marketing & Digital Analytics (MKIB340) | UG & PG | RStudio, Sentiment Analysis, LDA Topic Modeling |
| Market Research (MKIB256) | UG | Statistics, Experimental Design, SPSS |
| Fundamentals of Marketing (MKIB153) | UG | Marketing Core Concepts |
| Digital Marketing, Analytics & AI+ | HCT | ML, Data Viz, Applied AI for Marketing |

300+ hours as Teaching Assistant across undergraduate and postgraduate courses.

---

## Interactive Demos

- [ML for Marketing Lab](#) — Interactive HCT learning lab
- [Churn Prediction Simulator](#) — Streamlit · Render
- [Embedding Similarity Explorer](#) — Gradio · Hugging Face Spaces

---

## Academic Job Market

Available for **Assistant Professor** or **Postdoctoral** positions in Marketing
(August 2026 or earlier). Please feel free to reach out — I welcome inquiries about
my research, teaching, and availability.

[Send Email](mailto:qijia.liv@gmail.com)
